sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, bitmap_column AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([1, 2, 3])), (2, bitmapBuild([2, 3, 4]));
UPDATE test_table SET bitmap_column = bitmapUnion(bitmap_column, bitmapBuild([5])) WHERE id = 2;
SELECT bitmapCardinality(bitmap_column) AS cardinality FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapCardinality(bitmap_column) AS cardinality FROM test_table GROUP BY id;
